ratings.comment: Possibly the best professor! He is very caring and understanding. The material is simple, and he understands if you can't make a deadline and gives you the chance for revisions. He has excellent taste in movies, and I love him!!
Is really a dream come true in a teacher

Awesome professor. As everyone else said, he cares deeply about the students in his class and does all he can to help them. He gives thorough, well-thought out critiques and is willing to talk to you about whatever you want to talk about. He's got good taste in books and movies. He responds well to humor and you kinda want him to be your grandpa.
he is amazing! come to class, participate (he will call names), and do the essays (1-2 pgs). do all of this and u will be guaranteed an A.

amazing prof! he is super caring and is very invested into his student's works and questions they have. couple of essays but usually 1-2 pages. he cares for effort and if u come to class and participate u WILL get an A.
larold is pretty chill, wouldnt recommend taking it again because my brain hurts from reading faulkner. my mother is a fish, and larold will never let me forget that.
Larry is the man. He took time to individually help every student better their writing. He is extremely knowledgeable and passionate about the material he teaches. 10/10 would recommend.
Larry was an amazing teacher! He helped me to greatly improve my writing ability. I would highly recommend him!

Larry is one of the best professors out there. The class required a good amount of work, but nothing too challenging. But do all of the work assigned for a good grade. He is a pretty easy grader and gives good feedback. Overall you can tell he loves what he does and cares about his students.

Larry is by far the best professor that I've had at the university. Although the class demands a lot of time, it is worth it.  I have become a better writer, and it's helped me in my other classes. As well, Larry genuinely wants his students to succeed; he wrote a letter of recommendation for me on short notice.
